chinese_news.title: 2026 AI最佳场景渗透案例重磅揭晓
chinese_news.summary:
如果用一个词来描述当下的AI产业，“落地”已有些过时，“渗透”则更为准确。

“渗透”意味着AI不再是发布会上的炫技Demo，也不再是PPT里的概念模型，而是像水电煤一样，悄无声息地融入企业运营的毛细血管和用户日常的消费决策中。

据麦肯锡《2025 AI应用现状调研》报告显示，在国内大模型的快速崛起推动下，生成式AI已广泛渗透至企业运营中，83%的企业在至少一个职能中实现了常态化使用，这一比例显著领跑全球。更关键

大公司：

腾讯：Hy3 preview调用量持续居OpenRouter榜首，Agent密集发布

36氪获悉，腾讯发布2026年第一季度财报，AI全线提速。其中，混元不到三个月完成重建，Hy3 preview在上下文、Agent、Coding等能力上显著提升。OpenRouter数据显示，Hy3 preview结束限免期后，日Token用量和周Token调用量仍保持榜首；4月27日至5月11日连续三周登顶OpenRouter周榜总榜。今年以来，腾讯累计上线数十款通用和垂直场景Agent。

chinese_news.title: 林俊旸创业，新公司估值约20亿美金丨智能涌现独家
chinese_news.summary:
文｜周鑫雨 邓咏仪

编辑｜杨轩

林俊旸以创业者的身份，重新加入AI模型的战场。

《智能涌现》独家获悉，前阿里千问大模型技术负责人林俊旸近期已经开启创业，考虑方向包括世界模型和具身大脑。

目前，林俊旸已经招募数名字节、腾讯和海外背景的成员，并以约20亿美金的估值开启融资，接触基金包括红杉中国、高榕创投等。

截至发稿前，有关上述信息，林俊旸尚未回复。

时间距离3月初的那场“闪电”诀别，已经过去了两个月。

2026年3月4日凌晨，林俊旸在X上宣布离开千问：“me stepping down. bye my beloved qwen（我卸任了。再见了，我深爱的千问）。”更早前，3月3日下午，他在Qwen成员的钉钉群中发出消息：“无颜再带领大家。”

在从百模大战，快速收束至巨头争锋（字节、阿里、DeepSeek）的三年里，林俊旸是阿里Qwen留在大

chinese_news.title: 6月上海，这场论坛聊透出海真问题
chinese_news.summary:
副标题：韧性全球化，AI向未来｜EqualOcean2026出海全球化百人论坛（GGF2026）将于6月11日在上海举行

出海这件事，已经变了。

如果今天还把出海理解为“寻找增量市场”，大概率已经慢了一步。

 如今，中国企业出海已经进入一个全新的阶段。真正拉开差距的，早已不是“是否出海”，而是：

· 下一阶段最值得重仓的区域市场在哪里？

· AI应该优先进入哪些关键环节，才能形成真正差异化？

chinese_news.title: 36氪专访 | 安克创新eufyMake负责人：众筹超4000万美金后，还在红海寻找缝隙
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 张子怡

编辑 | 袁斯来

那是一个价值5000万美元成功故事诞生的夜晚。

eufyMake的产研负责人Cheney Xie仍然记得狂喜带来的多巴胺。那是2025年4月29日晚上十点，eufy MakeUV打印机E1上线众筹。

首个100万美元的记录用时不过一分钟。“感觉像爆金币一样，金额哗啦啦涨上去。”

当夜无人入眠。直到凌晨四五点，组内的同学还在不停更新着众筹金额的实时截图。

时至今日，eufyMake E1仍以4670万美元的众筹金额，维持着Kickstarter历史上融资额最高的项目记录。

eufyMake E1走过了近一年，产品在海外已接近完全交付。eufyMake E1在国内市场也正式开启售卖。

无论是对安克创新，还是对eufyMake，成功量产且交付都颇具里程碑意味。毕竟，E1是全球首款消费级UV打印机，生产它需要全新的经验，也要面临复杂的产业

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发 | 清华系光计算芯片企业完成数千万天使轮融资，瞄准全波光计算架构
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 乔钰杰

编辑 | 袁斯来

硬氪获悉，近日，光子芯力（北京）科技有限公司（以下简称“光子芯力”）宣布完成数千万元天使轮融资，由苏州芯阳基金、驰星创投、盛景嘉成联合领投，开源创投跟投。

光子芯力成立于2024年，总部位于北京，是一家专注于光电融合计算芯片的硬科技初创公司。公司创始人杨其晟博士毕业于清华大学集成电路学院，具备光电融合交叉背景，核心团队亦主要来自清华大学，成员覆盖光学、算法、半导体及产业资源等方向。

当前，光计算正被视为突破电子芯片“功耗墙”“存储墙”的重要方向之一，行业也逐渐进入产业化前夜。光子芯力的核心产品聚焦于光电异构计算芯片及配套软件工具链。

硬件层面，光子芯力创新性地采用了“全波计算”技术路线。杨其晟介绍，目前光计算领域的技术路径尚未完全收敛，公司选择基于“全波超表面”的差异化路线，目标是最大化释放光计算的性能潜力。

不同于传统将集成光学元

chinese_news.title: 深耕“具身智能+建筑大模型”底座，重构万亿建筑业，「方石机器人」完成近亿元A轮融资 | 36氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
36氪获悉，智能建造机器人本体开发商北京方石机器人有限公司（下称「方石机器人」）近期宣布完成近亿元A轮融资，由北京科创亦庄直投基金、航发基金等机构联合投资。资金将主要用于核心产品的研发迭代投入、批量化生产交付能力建设以及海外市场体系布局。

方石机器人产品矩阵

方石机器人成立于2019年，致力于解决建筑行业用工老龄化、作业环境高危低效等痛点，通过打造全栈自研的“具身智能+建筑大模型”AI解决方案，推动传统建筑业向智能建造模式转型。目前，公司已深度

宇树科技发布GD01载人变形机甲，投资人回应

5月12日，宇树发布GD01载人变形机甲GD01，定价390万元起。宇树创始人王兴兴亲自登上机甲驾驶舱，并演示了一段真人操作。根据官方介绍，该产品为全球首款量产版载人机甲，可以变形，民用交通工具，体重约500kg（载人后）。宇树早期投资人赵楠表示：宇树一直在围绕它的科技树路线图做探索。机甲机器人的核心是通过一个容易破圈的场景向全世界表达了宇树在传感器、控制器和工程能力这些机器人核心技术上的优越性。与其它公司不同，宇树的产品本身的破圈性就是营销的引擎。（第一

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin close above $85,000 by end of Q2 2026 (June 30)?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Producer price inflation at 6% (highest since 2022) creates immediate Fed rate path uncertainty; BTC currently dips below $80k on inflation surprise, but Trump-Xi summit may shift risk-on sentiment.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (PPI 6% YoY April), CoinDesk (BTC below $80k), Trump Beijing visit timing

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Fed cut rates at least once before end of 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Hot PPI print (6%) contradicts market expectations for near-term cuts; Jamie Dimon's UK PM warning signals broader financial stability concerns; resolution by December 2026 FOMC dot plot.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (wholesale inflation surge, Dimon bond market warning)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will OpenAI achieve a $100B+ valuation in a new funding round by end of 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Altman-Musk fallout narrative resurfaces; AI capex boom (hyperscaler buildout) validates OpenAI's moat; pre-IPO token volatility (Anthropic/OpenAI secondaries plunging) signals market pricing pressure.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (Altman/Musk fallout, AI capital spending boom), CoinDesk (pre-IPO share transfer invalidations)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Anduril exceed $80B valuation by EOY 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Anduril just doubled to $60B+ on $185B Trump Golden Dome defense contract momentum; defense tech funding boom is live; clear resolution via funding round announcements.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will UK PM Starmer remain in office through end of 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Jamie Dimon explicitly signals JPMorgan reconsidering London office if Starmer is ousted; Starmer leadership under pressure per bond market stress; high-profile CEO concern = actionable signal.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (Dimon warning, bond market pressure on Starmer)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Ethereum close above $3,500 on or before June 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinGecko or CoinMarketCap ETH/USD price feed at 11:59 PM UTC
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Tokenized real estate and DeFi infrastructure (Figure's $19B tokenized assets on Ethereum via Animoca/NUVA, Brickken NAV oracles) create real on-chain yield demand; hyperscaler AI energy demand also props Layer 1 value. Most prediction markets price ETH as purely speculative, missing infrastructure tailwind.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk (Animoca-backed NUVA/Figure tokenization milestone), Cointelegraph (Brickken/Magma NAV oracle for real estate)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will NVIDIA stock (NVDA) gain more than 20% between May 5 and December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Yahoo Finance NVDA adjusted close price; baseline = May 5, 2026 close
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CNBC identifies 'two under-the-radar stocks' as AI energy beneficiaries; hyperscaler capex boom is 'historic and staggering'; NVDA dominance in GPU supply creates captive upside. Market consensus likely hedges NVIDIA on China restrictions and competition; Trump-Xi summit could clarify export rules favorably.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC (AI capital spending magnitude, hyperscaler energy demand), Trump Beijing summit outcome on tech/tariffs

market_questions_to_create.question: Will a major US crypto regulatory clarity bill (e.g., Clarity Act with substantive amendments) pass both chambers of Congress and be signed by Trump by end of 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Congress.gov bill tracker (bill status = 'Signed into Law'), Trump statement confirmation
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CoinDesk reports Clarity Act amendments would 'remake key parts of crypto bill but have doubtful future'—market is pricing this as DOA. However, Trump's pro-crypto stance (Anduril/Golden Dome, macro deregulation agenda) + bipartisan momentum + crypto lobby capex suggest 60%+ real probability. Prediction markets treat crypto regulation as niche; mainstream crypto adoption thesis hinges on this.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk (Clarity Act amendments, legislative feasibility), Trump administration posture on crypto in Beijing summit context

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the DXY (US Dollar Index) close below 100 by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: FRED (Federal Reserve Economic Data) or ICE DXY official close
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: PPI at 6% signals persistent inflation; Trump's tariff negotiations with Xi create currency war risk (USD volatile); Fed rate cut probability (if it materializes) weakens DXY. Gold, BTC, and EM assets all invert on DXY weakness. Crypto traders underweight macro FX mechanics.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC (PPI 6%, Dimon bond market warning, Trump-Xi tariff/trade talks)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Alibaba's core profit margin recover to above 20% by end of Q3 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Alibaba quarterly earnings report (operating margin / revenue), investor relations disclosure
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CNBC reports Alibaba struck 'bullish tone on AI' despite core profit plunge in Q1 2026. Market pricing Alibaba as value trap; but if AI cloud/model investments yield tangible revenue uplift by Q3, margin recovery is plausible. Chinese AI infrastructure play is undersold in Western prediction markets. FLAG: 36Kr sources Alibaba agent and model pipeline ahead of English coverage—watch Alibaba's AI monetization closely.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC (Alibaba AI strategy, profit plunge paradox), 36Kr (Alibaba AI店小蜜 conversion uplift, Agent releases on OpenRouter)

investment_theses.thesis: Long BTC/USD on Trump-Xi summit clarity and Fed rate-cut delay: inflation print (PPI 6%) removes near-term taper expectations, but Trump's macro deal-making in Beijing may reduce immediate tariff risk, shifting sentiment from deflationary rate-cut play to hard-assets inflation hedge.
supporting_signals: CNBC: PPI 6% YoY (biggest since 2022), exceeds 0.5% expected, reverses Fed cut narrative
CNBC: Trump arrives in Beijing for Xi summit; tariff & AI policy negotiation expected
CoinDesk: Bitcoin dips below $80k on inflation surprise, technical washout creates entry
investment_theses.counter_view: If Trump-Xi talks collapse or tariff escalation resumes, risk-off sentiment could push BTC back to $70k; inflation staying sticky forces Fed into earlier hawkish hold, which competes with commodities for safe-haven flows.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC perpetual futures (5-10x leverage or unlevered spot), or long BTC Call spreads (Jun 2026 $85K / $90K expiry)

investment_theses.thesis: Short DXY (long EM/commodities proxy) on Fed rate path uncertainty + Trump devaluation rhetoric: PPI surge forces Fed to pause cuts, but Trump's tariff negotiations with China signal currency volatility; EM currencies and commodity-linked equities rally on weaker USD narrative.
supporting_signals: CNBC: PPI 6% removes imminent rate cut, keeping USD supported near-term, but Dimon's UK warning suggests bond market stress (yield volatility) and capital flight concern
BBC/CNBC: Trump in China for trade/tariff talks; macro uncertainty typically weakens USD mid-term
Implied: AI energy demand (hyperscaler capex boom) may inflate commodity prices (copper, energy), which invert on strong USD
investment_theses.counter_view: If Fed stays hawkish on 6% inflation for longer than expected, DXY could retest 105+ on safe-haven flows; Trump-Xi talks could result in *more* tariff commitments, strengthening USD as recession hedge.
investment_theses.expression: Short DXY (DXY perpetuals or short 3x leveraged DXY ETF), Long commodities ETF (DBC, commodities futures), or Long EM equity ETF (EEM, IEMG)

investment_theses.thesis: Long semiconductor / AI infrastructure capex beneficiaries (NVDA, SMH, or optical/photonic chip plays) on hyperscaler buildout durability: CNBC cites 'historic and staggering' AI capital spending; 36Kr reports China's optical computing startups (光子芯力 angel round) capturing a slice of the capex boom, signaling durable secular demand.
supporting_signals: CNBC: 'Hyperscalers' AI buildout will require massive amounts of energy. Two under-the-radar stocks will benefit.' AI capex magnitude is 'historic and staggering.'
36Kr: 光子芯力 (Photonic Chippower) raises tens of millions in angel round for optical-electronic fusion compute; signals China's alternative to NVIDIA, validating broader infrastructure demand
CoinDesk: Ledger IPO on hold, but Coinbase-backed x402 adds batch settlement for AI agent payments—on-chain infrastructure for AI agents also heating up
investment_theses.counter_view: Semiconductor valuations already price in multiyear capex cycle; if AI ROI disappoints (e.g., models plateau in capability), capex pullback is brutal. Geopolitical chip restrictions (US-China) could crater semiconductor stocks if exports are banned.
investment_theses.expression: Long NVDA (stock or call spreads; 6–12 month horizon), or Long SMH (Semiconductor Select Sector SPDR), or broad Tech (QQQ) with hedges on geopolitical risk

investment_theses.thesis: Long cryptoassets (BTC/ETH) on regulatory clarity catalyst and inflation hedge combination: Clarity Act prospects improve if Trump administration pushes for pro-crypto framework; 6% PPI inflation validates crypto as non-correlated store of value; Ledger IPO delay + pre-IPO volatility signals capitulation, leaving room for sentiment reset on regulation win.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: Clarity Act amendments 'would remake key parts of crypto bill but have doubtful future'—low market expectations; Trump's macro deregulation posture suggests upside
CoinDesk: Anthropic/OpenAI pre-IPO token secondaries plunge on invalid transfer rules; capitulation mood in crypto venture markets
CNBC: PPI 6% inflation revalidates crypto as hedge; Trump's Beijing tariff negotiations create macro volatility (volatility benefits risk-off BTC accumulation)
investment_theses.counter_view: If regulatory clarity stalls or Trump-Xi summit leads to *more* tariffs / stagflation, crypto is perceived as risk-off sell, not safe haven; pre-IPO token implosions signal venture cap destruction, which could reverse sentiment on crypto VC ecosystem (Anduril, Coinbase, etc.).
investment_theses.expression: Long ETH (spot or 2-3x leverage), Long BTC/ETH ratio (express bet on ETH infrastructure outperformance on tokenization / DeFi real-asset adoption), or Long Superform (UP) / Injective (INJ) on on-chain infrastructure plays

investment_theses.thesis: Long defense-tech equities (especially aerospace, drone, interceptor supply chain) on Trump's $185B Golden Dome initiative and Anduril momentum: Anduril's doubling to $60B+ on Golden Dome contract signals deal credibility; broader capex for US space-based defense systems creates multi-year revenue stream for Northrop, L3Harris, Anduril, and supply chain.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Anduril doubles valuation to $60B+ on space-based interceptor work for $185B Golden Dome defense system
BBC: Trump-Xi meeting agenda includes Iran war & Taiwan tensions, likely reaffirms US defense posture / capex priority
36Kr: Chinese AI/robotics buildout (humanoid mecha, embodied AI) signals accelerating international defense-tech race
investment_theses.counter_view: If Trump-Xi talks de-escalate tensions (e.g., peace deal in Iran, Taiwan status quo), defense capex momentum could reverse; defense contractors are already richly valued on prior capex cycles; geopolitical peace dividend is real downside risk.
investment_theses.expression: Long ITA (defense ETF), Long LMT (Lockheed Martin), or Long NOC (Northrop Grumman) — or direct Anduril exposure if secondary market access (PreFund, SharePost, AngelList SPVs)
